summary: Comprehensive backend testing of the Autonomous SEO Agency Operator. All 25 pytest tests passed (100%) including the 4 full AI workflow types (keyword_research, technical_audit, competitor_analysis, strategy_sprint) which all transitioned queued→running→completed via background asyncio tasks using GPT-5.2 through EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Approval auto-creation, cascade delete, and all CRUD endpoints verified.

minor.issue: When payload is empty (all null), endpoint returns existing doc without updating updated_at — acceptable but inconsistent with regular update path.
Mutable default [] used for target_markets (PEP-8 minor; not a runtime bug because Pydantic copies defaults).
No 404 check on associated cleanups; if client exists deletes proceed which is fine. (Behaviour correct, just a note.)

critical_code_review_comments: agents.py uses load_dotenv() without explicit path — works because CWD is /app/backend, but explicit Path(__file__).parent / '.env' is safer (server.py already does this).
workflow.launch_workflow_task uses asyncio.create_task without holding a strong reference; tasks could in theory be GC'd. Consider storing in a module-level set to be safe.
No retry/backoff on LLM calls in agents.py — a single transient failure marks the whole run failed. Consider retrying _run_agent on JSONDecodeError or network errors.

ApprovalDecision.status uses Literal['pending','approved','rejected'] so the explicit 400 check in decide_approval is unreachable (Pydantic returns 422 first). Either drop the runtime check or widen the type to str.
No pagination on /api/runs and /api/approvals beyond a hard-coded limit; fine for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up one TEST_ prefixed client (TEST_Acme Outdoors) plus 4 AI workflow runs and associated approvals. Cascade delete at end of suite removed all test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. The 4 AI workflows each take ~20-40s real time (total suite ~2.5 min). LLM responses are non-deterministic so assertions are kept loose (presence of agent in logs, non-empty results, completed status). Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. For frontend testing, all endpoints are working — focus on UI/integration layer.
